articles.summary: Milan Primavera suffered yet another defeat on Monday afternoon, leaving their play-off hopes in a delicate position. articles.title: Seven derbies in a row without losing: to review such a long streak for Milan you have to go back to Ancelotti
articles.summary: Milan (5W, 2D) remained unbeaten in at least seven derbies in a row against Inter in all competitions for the first time since the period between November 2002 and April 2005 (10 in that case). Opta reports it.

articles.title: With Allegri, Milan was reborn, the group and players all on Max's side: now the club will have to do its part
articles.summary: Massimiliano Allegri is one of the main architects of this wonderful journey in the championship. Max's work is there for all to see, for the experts and why not? Even from opponents.
